channel.title: The Rust Project — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by The Rust Project (rust).

item.title: CVE-2026-5223 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Crates in third party registries can override the cached source of other crates
item.description: Cargo incorrectly handled symlinks inside of crate tarballs downloaded from third-party registries, allowing a malicious crate to override the source code of another crate from the same registry. The severity of the vulnerability is **medium** for us…

item.title: CVE-2026-5222 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Cargo can be coerced to share credentials between registries
item.description: Cargo between 1.68 and 1.96 incorrectly normalized the URLs of third-party registries using the sparse index protocol. If a hosting provider allowed multiple registries to be hosted with arbitrary names within the same domain, an attacker able to pub…

item.title: CVE-2025-11233 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Rust standard library didn't detect all path separators on Cygwin
item.description: Starting from Rust 1.87.0 and before Rust 1.89.0, the tier 3 Cygwin target (`x86_64-pc-cygwin`) didn't correctly handle path separators, causing the standard library's Path API to ignore path components separated by backslashes. Due to this, programs…
